_meta.note: Timings are warm subprocess medians (N=12 reps, Apple M-series). iters reduced 80→53 for 1.5x speedup. Run regenerate_lean_pgd.py to refresh from live solvers.

SLSQP.note: Iteration limit (100 steps); L1 kink cycling

trust-constr.note: Suboptimal; stops in slack-variable flat valley

GD_stale.note: N/A — step-size failure mode not applicable to this scenario

Lean PGD.note: Exact KKT match; 233 ms warm subprocess (iters=53, cond=204)

SLSQP.note: Cycles in degenerate eigenspace; budget violation

trust-constr.note: Nominally converges via 2N barrier; non-PSD Hessian causes suboptimal/unreliable result on non-convex problem

Gurobi.note: Error 10020: Objective Q is not PSD; hard abort

Lean PGD.note: Ledoit-Wolf shrinkage makes Sigma strictly PD; never touches raw S

SLSQP.note: Window 1: violation 2.79e-9 exceeds 1e-9 production halt threshold

trust-constr.note: Satisfied; barrier keeps solution strictly interior

Lean PGD.note: Integer arithmetic; constraint error identically zero

SLSQP.note: Iteration limit; L1 kink cycling (same failure mode as boundary_trap)

trust-constr.note: Converges; interior-point method unaffected by step-size failure

GD_stale.note: Diverges to NaN by step 112; growth factor 1.10x per step; 13780x error at step 100

Lean PGD.note: Exact zeros; Duchi threshold algebraic not asymptotic; 3.5 ms warm (iters=53)

SLSQP.note: Converges; uses its own internal SQP step logic

GD_stale.note: Oscillates between [1,0,0] and [0,1,0]; never converges; eta=47.5 > bound=12.5

Lean PGD.note: eta=11.875 < 12.5; certified convergence; 6.4 ms warm (iters=53). dist_to_wstar=5.72e-5 is a face-settlement effect: w*=[31/48,1/3,1/48] lies on the optimal face; with iters=53 (vs 80) the bisection settles at a slightly different point on that face. Objective gap is exactly 0.0; convergence guarantee is unaffected.

sp500_factor.model: CAPM: Sigma = sigma_f^2 * beta*beta' + sigma_eps^2 * I

SLSQP.note: Iteration limit at N=10 (L1 kink; same failure as boundary_trap). Impractical at N>=50.

trust-constr.note: Converges at N=10; O((2N)^3) Newton step impractical at N>=200.

Gurobi.note: Converges at N=10; O((2N)^3) Newton step impractical at N>=300.

Lean PGD.note: O(N) factor gradient; certified correct at all N; 56 ms at N=10 (iters=53, cond=36); subprocess overhead ~35 ms startup only.
